gap: tooling — discard/release refuses state_compliance_authority_invalid on a schema-2 adaptive project both pre-bootstrap (frozen-never-run) and mid-run (compliance rows exist only for closed nodes, check requires all N); discard is structurally unavailable between freeze and full completion. filed: #735
gap: environment — startup claim escalated target_indeterminate 5x on 2026-07-19 (HTTP proxy 129.211.81.198:26927 rejects rapid gh bursts, EADDRNOTAVAIL); recovered by retry after burst-test. Environmental flake, noise-class.
gap: plan — GAP-5 (discovered by n6): templates/routing/required-blocks.js fn-fast-compliance-backstop block obligates all 6 finalize surfaces to carry the fast-compliance-backstop PIN + fast_compliance_unresolved token; file unowned by any node, so n6 kept the PIN as dormant-legacy prose. Needs plan-level ownership (with GAP-1..4) in the repair epoch.
gap: plan — GAP-6 (discovered by n8): plugins/kaola-workflow-{gitlab,gitea}/scripts/test-{gitlab,gitea}-sinks.js carry a workflow_path:fast plan-absent finalize fixture (now refuses adaptive_plan_missing); unowned by any node; keeps gitlab/gitea chains red until migrated. Needs plan-level ownership (with GAP-1..5) in the repair epoch.
gap: plan — GAP-7 (discovered by n9): scripts/test-bundle-finalize.js (36 tests) fails adaptive_plan_missing on plan-absent finalize fixtures; in no node's write set; keeps the claude chain red until migrated (same seedAdaptiveFinalizeFixture pattern as n8). Needs plan-level ownership (with GAP-1..6) in the repair epoch.
gap: tooling — #719 workaround applied at replan prepare: hand-appended canonical pending compliance rows for n11-code-certify + n12-finalize (schema-2 freeze omitted the one-row-per-node pre-seed; section outside plan_hash). filed: #719
gap: tooling — #719-family workaround at replan prepare: review-failed fold left workflow-tasks.json stale (n11 in_progress vs ledger pending); refreshed via kaola-workflow-task-mirror.js --project. filed: #719
gap: tooling — #720 workaround applied: replan prepare/resume run through a scratchpad copy of kaola-workflow-replan.js whose verifyCandidate falls back to computeLandableTreeDigest for schema-2 attempts (raw ls-tree comparison kept for legacy); candidate proven unchanged (landable digest 6bf7536c… == attempt digest). No journal/attempt/source/plan mutation. filed: #720

gap: tooling — #722 workaround applied: rotated .cache/review-attempts.json to a fresh child-bound V2 journal (parent journal digest-preserved byte-identical in .cache/epochs/1/files/, digest 77ef1fec…); activation lacks the cross-epoch journal rotation. filed: #722
